item.title: A venus flytrap ate my finger
item.description: A Venus flytrap closes around a finger in a safe experiment, showing how the plant’s trap works.

item.title: How can something fall faster than gravity?

item.title: What happens to a drone in an elevator?

item.title: The twin paradox made visible
item.description: A science experiment makes the twin paradox easier to picture, turning a tricky physics idea into a clear visual demonstration.
